emails.subject: Re: PEC Guaranty
emails.body: Susan, I just spoke to Mary Klyasheff at People's Energy. She is ok with all changes except State of Texas. She has suggested New York as a neutral state. Seeing that Enovate is a joint venture between ENA and People's, can we accept New York law on their guaranty. Give me your thoughts. Thanks, Ted X-37952 Susan Scott 11/10/2000 02:25 PM

emails.subject: Re: PEC Guaranty
emails.body: Susan, I just spoke to Mary Klyasheff at People's Energy. She is ok with all changes except State of Texas. She has suggested New York as a neutral state. Seeing that Enovate is a joint venture between ENA and People's, can we accept New York law on their guaranty. Give me your thoughts. Thanks, Ted X-37952 Susan Scott 11/10/2000 02:25 PM
